meaning: n.(牲畜等的)尿adj.不新鲜的,陈腐的,疲倦的,陈旧的vt.使变旧,走味vi.变陈旧,变无味,失时效,撒尿
examples: There was a powerful smell of stale beer.
A miasma of stale alcohol hung around him.
Ford said in a speech that our love affair with cars is stale, maybe even dying.
Data will be stale, and specific actions will be lost the longer the delay is.
